item.title: Frame with Diaphragms
item.description: A three-dimensional reinforced concrete rigid frame, is subjected to bi-directional earthquake ground motion. Example5.tcl RCsection.tcl Or for Python: Example5.py render.py In both cases, the following ground motion records are required: tabasFN.txt tabasFP.txt Modeling   A model of the rigid frame shown in the figure below is created. The model consists of three stories and one bay in each direction. Rigid diaphragm multi-point constraints are used to enforce the rigid in-plane stiffness assumption for the floors.
